description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses node:8.12.0-alpine as the global Docker image and runs a global before_script `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install`. Define a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores the `node_modules/` and `.yarn` directories and is marked untracked. Define a single stage called test. Add a job named Test in the test stage that overrides the image to `buildkite/puppeteer:v1.11.0`, runs a before_script `yarn config set cache-folder .yarn` and `yarn install`, then executes `npm run test:build:server`.
